generationNotes: TestGen emits integration, e2e (API), and browser (MCP checklist) layers only. Executable Playwright UI specs in tests/playwright-ui/scenarios/ are owned by the browser test agent codegen step — do not duplicate Playwright UI automation as layer:e2e cases in TestGen artifacts.
Harness planner regenerates rules[] from actual AC/FR/NFR tags in generated BRDs. coverageHints must reference routes and roles from product specs, not template literals.

coverageHints: integration: AC-01/AC-05 using POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/open and /close by Lecturer role
integration: AC-08 duplicate prevention on POST /v1/check-ins for Student role
api-e2e: AC-15/AC-16 enforce role scope on GET /v1/reports/attendance and POST /v1/exports/attendance
http-contract: FR-15 and FR-36 with POST /v1/auth/login then GET /v1/me
http-contract: FR-04 enrollment import on POST /v1/enrollments/import with row-level rejection assertions
http-contract: FR-19 live roster payload shape from GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance
rule-order: BR-01..BR-10 short-circuit behavior for POST /v1/check-ins
idempotency: BR-07 one-success-per-session enforced with duplicate replay attempts
authorization: BR-18 and BR-19 role-scope denials for Student and cross-scope Lecturer access
performance-smoke: NFR-01 and NFR-03 against POST /v1/check-ins under class-start concurrency
rbac-negative: NFR-09 deny Student on GET /v1/audit-logs and out-of-scope Lecturer exports
audit-completeness: NFR-13 verifies failed check-ins and manual corrections are queryable via GET /v1/audit-logs
